zh.Lathom Park Chapel, Lathom St James, Lan: 英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯
zh.Lathom St James, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Wheaten於1056年10月2日出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Richard I Wheaten22歲，母親Gunnora Haraldsdotter20歲。她於1077年7月14日與Henry Woodward在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1127年3月16日在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年70歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.Lathom St James, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Wheaten于1056年10月2日出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Richard I Wheaten22岁，母亲Gunnora Haraldsdotter20岁。她于1077年7月14日与Henry Woodward在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1127年3月16日在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯享年70岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Wheaten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Robert Wheaton came from England to Rehoboth, MA, c. 1636.

variants.name: Whiddon
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from any of numerous minor places in Devon named Whiddon. Some are named with Old English hwīt ‘white’ + dūn ‘hill’ or tūn ‘farmstead, estate’; others with Old English hwǣte ‘wheat’ + dūn or denu ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Wheaten was born on 2 October 1056, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard I Wheaten, was 22 and her mother, Gunnora Haraldsdotter, was 20. She married Henry Woodward on 14 July 1077, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 16 March 1127, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Wheaten est née le 2 octobre 1056, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard I Wheaten, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Gunnora Haraldsdotter, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Woodward le 14 juillet 1077, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1127, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Wheaten am 2. Oktober 1056 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard I Wheaten 22 und ihre Mutter Gunnora Haraldsdotter 20. Sie hat am 14. Juli 1077 in Yorkshire, England Henry Woodward geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 16. März 1127 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wheaten è nata il il 2 ottobre 1056 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard I Wheaten, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Gunnora Haraldsdotter, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Henry Woodward il 14 luglio 1077, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 16 marzo 1127, nel Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wheatenが1056年10月2日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Richard I Wheatenは22歳，母Gunnora Haraldsdotterは20歳であった。1077年7月14日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでHenry Woodwardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1127年3月16日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで70歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Wheaten(이)가 1056년 10월 2일 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard I Wheaten(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gunnora Haraldsdotter(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1077년 7월 14일 영국 요르크실르에서 Henry Woodward(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1127년 3월 16일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

mn.2 October 1056–16 March 1127: 1056 оны Аравдугаар сарын 2–1127 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 16

pt.2 October 1056–16 March 1127: 2 de outubro de 1056–16 de março de 1127
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wheaten nasceu em 2 de outubro de 1056, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard I Wheaten, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Gunnora Haraldsdotter, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Woodward em 14 de julho de 1077, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1127, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Wheaten родилась 2 октября 1056 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard I Wheaten было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Gunnora Haraldsdotter, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Woodward 14 июля 1077 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 16 марта 1127 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.

es.2 October 1056–16 March 1127: 2 de octubre de 1056–16 de marzo de 1127
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Wheaten nació el 2 de octubre de 1056, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard I Wheaten, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Gunnora Haraldsdotter, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Henry Woodward el 14 de julio de 1077, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1127, en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
